headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Agilent, Dollar General, FedEx, GE Aerospace, Hershey, Intuit, SanDisk, Workday, Zscaler, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher as we hit the mid-week point, as the technology-led rally continues to spiral higher. While the major indices finished the day mixed, the technology-heavy Nasdaq led the way once again, closing at a new record high of 26,656, up 1.19%, while the S&P 500 also set a new ... headline: Mizuho Upgrades Phillips 66 to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $212
summary: Mizuho  analyst Nitin Kumar   upgrades Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) from Neutral to Outperform and raises the price target from $170 to $212.
